quadruple-chocolate-chip-cookies.name: Quadruple Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Beat butter, white sugar, and brown sugar together in a bowl with an electric mixer until creamy. Beat eggs and vanilla into butter mixture until eggs are completely incorporated.

Whisk flour, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl. Add flour mixture to butter mixture and stir to combine. Fold white chocolate chips, milk chocolate chips, semisweet chocolate chips, and peanut butter chips into dough. Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate until dough is firm, about 2 hours.
Drop spoonfuls of the cookie dough 2 inches apart onto baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until cookies are lightly browned and puffed up, 10 to 12 minutes. Cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.

quince-jelly-argiro.name: Quince Jelly
instructions: For the quince jelly, choose ripe and tight quinces without blows.
Wash the quinces with their skin. With a clean towel we wipe them very well. Cut to four and then each slice in half.
Place them in a pot with the peel and the heart-puddles without cleaning them. Cover with water, cover them well.
Cover the pot and bottle for 30′′.
We put tulpan in a colander. As long as the quinces are still warm, we strain them into the tulpani and keep the water and all the melted fruits -sarca, peels and seeds in the tulpan.

Tie the tulpan in a pouch and fasten it onto the pot with the water boiled by the quinces. So all night long, all the quince juice drops drop into the water. The water of the quinces after boiling will remain about 1 litre.
The next day, we squeeze very well, in the pot with the water of the quinces, the tulpan, to get as much quince juice as we can. We're throwing away what's left of it.
Finish the quince jelly, adding the sugar, orange and lemon juices, and mix to melt the sugar.
Add the arboriza and bottle for 30′ in medium to high heat, until the liquid starts to thinken and a nice dark pink to red color.

To make sure the jelly has the right density, freeze a plate in the freezer for a while. Pour some hot jelly on the frozen plate. Pull a groove and if the line is not closed by liquid jelly then we have the ideal lemon density.

quinoa-salad-with-mint-almonds-and-cranb.name: Quinoa Salad With Mint, Almonds And Cranberries

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a saucepan over high heat. Add quinoa, reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until the quinoa is tender and the liquid has been absorbed, about 13 minutes. Stir in olive oil; fluff quinoa with a fork. Set aside to cool slightly.
Stir mint, almonds, dried cranberries, kale, carrots, celery, scallion, grape tomatoes, lemon juice, and lemon zest. Season to taste with salt and ground black pepper.
